title: Summer Garden Market and Seed Swap returns to Hoekwil
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Gardeners, growers and...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Gardeners, growers and craft enthusiasts can look forward to a day outdoors when the annual Summer Garden Market and Seed Swap takes place on Saturday 22 November at the Woodville Trading Store near Hoekwil.


> The market will run from 10:00 to 15:00, weather permitting.


The event, which has become popular among local growers, will feature seeds, seedlings, plants, crafts and more, offering visitors the chance to stock up for their summer gardens or exchange seeds with fellow enthusiasts.

This year’s market will also serve as an informal end-of-year braai, adding a festive atmosphere to the day.

The Woodville Trading Store, located at the corner of the Seven Passes Road and Bergplaas Road, provides a rustic and scenic backdrop for the community gathering.

Families are encouraged to attend, enjoy the stalls and connect with other gardeners in the region.

For booking a stall or more information, contact Rebecca on 079 391 1162.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
